problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Combining Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
